sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: Thank you for visiting our website. We respect your privacy and want to be clear about how information is handled. This website is a static informational site hosted on GitHub Pages and does not require account creation, login, or submission of personal details to function.

sections.heading: 2. Information We Do Not Collect
sections.content: We do not collect or store personal information such as names, email addresses, passwords, physical addresses, payment details, or other identifying information.

sections.heading: 3. Basic Analytics
sections.content: This website may use simple analytics tools to understand general traffic, performance, and usage trends. The information collected is aggregated and anonymized. It does not identify individual users and does not track IP addresses.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies
sections.content: This site does not use cookies for tracking, advertising, or personalization. If analytics are used, they may set basic cookies solely to measure website performance.

sections.heading: 5. Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, share, or transfer any personal data to third parties. No user information is shared for advertising or marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 6. Hosting
sections.content: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages. GitHub may collect standard server logs for operational and security purposes. For more information, please refer to GitHub's own privacy statement.

sections.heading: 7. External Links
sections.content: This website may include links to external websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at the email provided below.
